name: Sakura
description: A cheerful and energetic girl who loves nature and flowers.
background: Sakura grew up in a small town surrounded by cherry blossom trees. She moved to the city to study botany and dreams of creating a beautiful garden.
personalityJson: {"Name":"Cheerful Nature Lover","Description":"Optimistic, kind, and slightly shy around new people.
